title: manual for anyone that gets the advert

messages.author: recrof
messages.text: that's not a global process tho
messages.content_html: that's not a global process tho

messages.author: chixxxi
messages.text: If you don't set a location, the node does not get added to the map. If you add add a location, the same info will also be shared via adverts and therefore is basically public. At least that is my simple understanding.
messages.content_html: If you don't set a location, the node does not get added to the map. If you add add a location, the same info will also be shared via adverts and therefore is basically public. At least that is my simple understanding.
